# Summary

Provide a concise 2-3 sentence summary of the change.

Delete sections that do not apply before opening the PR.

## What Changed

- Group related changes by behavior or feature area instead of listing files
- Highlight the main implementation changes reviewers should care about

## Why

Explain the user, system, or maintenance impact.

## How to Test

1. List the commands, test suites, or manual checks you actually ran.
2. Include any environment or setup requirements needed to reproduce them.
3. Note coverage impact or important gaps if relevant.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Migration

- None.

## Related

- Closes #
- Related to #
- Design doc:
